title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: IBM Technology explores AI pair programming and AI-powered developer tools, highlighting how AI assists with debugging, code review, and productivity. The video frames AI as a collaborative teammate for software developers.
writeup: IBM Technology examines AI pair programming and the developer tools built around it, framing AI as a collaborative teammate rather than a standalone code generator. The video covers how these tools assist with debugging, code review, and code generation, including natural language programming as an input method. The throughline is developer productivity: AI handling routine assistance while the developer stays in the loop on review and direction.
